events.text: Goal!  Japan 0, Spain 1. Álvaro Morata (Spain) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by César Azpilicueta with a cross.
Ko Itakura (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Shogo Taniguchi (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Maya Yoshida (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Japan 1, Spain 1. Ritsu Doan (Japan) left footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Junya Ito with a headed pass.
Goal!  Japan 2, Spain 1. Ao Tanaka (Japan) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Kaoru Mitoma.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
